channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Integrity faces a critical moment of peril
item.description: Prediction markets are creating a digital Wild West, where well-placed opportunists can win big by betting on real-world events — from the capture of ...

item.title: Kennedy says FDA "will act on" ultra-processed foods petition, but indicates no new rules
item.description: The Trump administration will respond to a citizen petition calling for a regulatory overhaul of ultra-processed foods , Health and Human Services Sec...

item.title: Russia accused of killing Navalny with dart frog toxin. What we know about the rare poison
item.description: European allies' findings that Putin critic Alexei Navalny was killed with a rare toxin from poison dart frogs is "troubling," said Secretary of State...

item.title: Moore's bitter Maryland fights threaten '28 hopes
item.description: Maryland Gov. Wes Moore 's national star is on the rise, but his relationships with fellow Democrats in his backyard are fraying. Why it matters: Moor...

item.title: Pelosi's new campaign: Boost Newsom for 2028
item.description: Nancy Pelosi is retiring from Congress, but she has more campaigns in mind. Among them: Boost Gavin Newsom as a potential contender for the White Hous...

item.title: Trump in Iowa tries to shift the conversation back to the economy
item.description: A brief swing through the farm state underscored administration fears about the midterms.

item.title: Americans give Trump low marks on handling of economy as midterms likely to center on affordability
item.description: Sixty-one percent of voters told a CNN poll released Friday that they disapprove of the way Trump is handling the economy.

item.title: Capitol agenda: Trump tests GOP with Fed probe

item.title: Deterring Illegal Immigration: This Town Decided that Actions Speak Louder than Words
